title: Riverside Farmers Market
description: Stop by the stand for whole pies, cookies, and muffins. Cash and card both welcome, first come first served while supplies last.

title: Late Summer Pie Pop-Up
location: Dang Good Pies Front Porch (address on order confirmation)
description: A porch pickup event for pre-ordered pies. Pre-orders open two weeks ahead through the contact info on the About page.

title: Fall Holiday Pie Pre-Orders Open
location: Order by phone or email, pickup details sent after ordering
description: Pre-order windows for Thanksgiving and other fall gatherings open this week. Get in early, slots are limited and fill up fast.
